description: Add a shared Ash-owned provider budget policy for Exa search/contents, SAM requests, and future paid retrieval. Reserve budget before work, record actual cost, prevent concurrent overspend, expose reset/remaining state, and make retries reuse the original reservation or idempotency key. Acceptance: concurrency, ceiling, reset, partial-failure, and zero-cost retry cases are tested without live provider spend.

comments.text: Starting isolated implementation after fx2.6 merged. Goal boundary: Ash-owned provider budget/reservation lifecycle plus Exa integration and focused evidence; preserve main-tree flake/runtime-notes edits.

Implementation evidence: Ash ProviderBudget/ProviderReservation windows and atomic validations; configured authority cannot be widened by callers; Exa preview reserves/settles/releases real cost; 122 acquisition/commercial/search tests passed, followed by 23 focused tests after final idempotency fix; ash.codegen --check, formatter, JSON, diff, and warnings-as-errors compile pass.

title: Enforce provider spend and quota policy
